---
name: 📖 Documentation Improvement
about: Suggest improvements or translations for the project documentation
title: '[Docs] <short description>'
labels: ['documentation']
---

### Path of the Document

Which document requires improvement (e.g. `README.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, translation files)?

### Current Content

What is the current wording/formatting that needs to be improved?

### Proposed Changes

What is the proposed new content or wording? If suggesting a translation, please specify the target language.

### Rationale

Why does this change help? (e.g. "it corrects a typo", "it makes the Windows setup instructions clearer").
